value.description: Data to encode (URL, text, vCard, etc.)

size.description: Output pixel size of the QR code (square)

errorCorrection.description: Error correction level. Auto-bumped to 'H' when a logo is provided

foreground.description: Color of filled modules. Default is black for maximum scannability — use a dark hex/named color when overriding (CSS variables that flip with dark mode are NOT recommended, as most phone scanners reject light-on-dark QR codes)

background.description: Color of the quiet zone and gaps. Default is white for maximum scannability. Use 'transparent' to omit

logo.type: { src: string; size?: number; padding?: number; rounded?: boolean }

onError.description: Fired when input is too long for the chosen error-correction level

alt.description: Accessible label (defaults to the value, truncated if long)
